overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking along a forest trail beside a turquoise lake, approaching a dramatic waterfall, and wading into the clear mountain water. The scene showcases lush summer vegetation, vibrant wildflowers, and high-quality game engine rendering with dynamic lighting and water effects.

events.description: character turns to look at the turquoise lake on the right before continuing forward

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path, briefly observing the lake to his right

entered.detail: dense pine and spruce trees covering the hillside
winding dirt trail with patches of grass and stones
clear blue-green alpine lake visible through the trees
towering evergreen trees lining the left side of the path
clusters of purple flowers growing along the trail edge
steep rock formation rising from the lake shore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit forest trail winding through dense coniferous woods. The camera follows Geralt from behind as he walks along the dirt path, with a vibrant turquoise lake visible to the right beyond the tree line. Purple and yellow wildflowers dot the grassy verges, and rocky cliffs rise from the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with scattered debris approaching waterfall

events.description: passing several round wooden objects or gourds scattered on the left side of the path
waterfall becomes visible in the distance as the path curves toward the water

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the trail at a steady pace, navigating past objects on the ground

entered.detail: several pumpkin or gourd-like objects resting on the ground beside the path
white cascade of water visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt continues along the forest trail, passing round wooden objects scattered on the left. The path remains dirt-based but becomes rockier as it descends slightly. In the distance, a waterfall becomes visible through the trees, indicating the path leads toward a water feature.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach to waterfall with heavy mist

events.description: entering the mist zone at the base of the waterfall, visibility slightly reduced by spray
character slows and stops briefly to observe the waterfall before continuing along the edge

agents.ego_description: Geralt carefully descending the rocky slope toward the waterfall, navigating the misty terrain

entered.detail: massive cascading waterfall creating a white curtain of water
thick water mist rising from the base of the falls
steep rocky slopes and boulders surrounding the waterfall
bright red and orange flowers growing on the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a rocky, mist-shrouded approach to the waterfall. The dirt path gives way to gravel and stone as Geralt descends toward the water. Heavy spray from the falls creates a hazy atmosphere, and vibrant red wildflowers contrast with the gray rocks along the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow turquoise pool at waterfall base

events.description: character steps from rocky shore into the shallow turquoise water
view opens up to reveal snow-capped mountains in the background across the water

agents.ego_description: Geralt wading into the clear shallow water, moving along the shoreline away from the waterfall

entered.detail: crystal clear shallow water with visible stones on the bottom
distant mountain peaks with snow visible against the sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches the base of the waterfall and steps into the shallow turquoise pool. The water is crystal clear, revealing the rocky bottom beneath. As he wades along the shore, the view opens to reveal majestic snow-capped mountains in the distance, with the coniferous forest continuing along the left bank.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit forest trail that gradually descends into a mist-shrouded waterfall basin. It begins by following Geralt through dense coniferous woods along a dirt path, where a vibrant turquoise lake and colorful wildflowers are visible beyond the tree line. As the path becomes rockier and descends, the camera passes scattered wooden objects while a distant waterfall emerges through the foliage. The scene then shifts into a hazy, spray-filled atmosphere where the dirt gives way to gray gravel and red wildflowers along the shoreline. Finally, the camera follows Geralt as he wades into the crystal-clear turquoise pool at the base of the falls, opening the view to reveal majestic snow-capped mountains in the distance.
